mapper.select: SELECT t1.*, t2.unit_name as measure_unit_name, t3.category_name, t4.warehouse_name FROM asset_detail t1 LEFT JOIN asset_unit t2 ON t1.measure_unit_id = t2.unit_id LEFT JOIN asset_category t3 ON t1.category_id = t3.category_id LEFT JOIN asset_warehouse t4 ON t1.warehouse_id = t4.warehouse_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t1.detail_id, t1.asset_name, t1.purchase_price, t2.unit_name as measureUnitName, t1.purchase_date, t1.out_status, t1.asset_status, t1.receive_user_name, t3.category_name, t4.warehouse_name FROM asset_detail t1 LEFT JOIN asset_unit t2 ON t1.measure_unit_id = t2.unit_id LEFT JOIN asset_category t3 ON t1.category_id = t3.category_id LEFT JOIN asset_warehouse t4 ON t1.warehouse_id = t4.warehouse_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
